name: Computer Science: Computer Game Design B.S.

categories.name: Calculus Sequence
categories.description: Choose one calculus sequence: MATH 19A/19B or MATH 20A/20B.

categories.name: Computational Foundations
categories.description: Required lower-division and foundational CSE courses. CSE 101 is upper-division but part of the computational foundations sequence.

categories.name: Systems Programming
categories.description: Choose one systems programming course: CSE 13S or ECE 13.

categories.name: Games and Playable Media Foundations
categories.description: Required games and playable media foundation courses.

categories.name: Game Design and Development
categories.description: Required game design and development courses. CMPM 130 also satisfies the DC requirement.

categories.name: Disciplinary Communication (DC)
categories.description: DC requirement satisfied by CMPM 130 (User Interface and User Experience Design), which is also counted in Game Design and Development.

categories.name: Comprehensive Requirement (Capstone)
categories.description: Both CMPM 170 (Rapid Prototyping) and CMPM 171 (Game Design Studio) are required for the comprehensive requirement. 7 units total.

categories.name: Computer Game Engineering Electives
categories.description: Choose 5 courses from the approved Computer Game Engineering elective list. No more than 2 may be from the restricted subset: CMPM 110, CMPM 122, CMPM 131, CMPM 132, CMPM 150, CMPM 177, CSE 103, CSE 104, ECON 166A.
